title: Publish issue 2046 stacked PRs

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Publish the already-implemented #2046 lane as stacked draft PRs.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not rewrite unrelated user changes; do not push directly to master; preserve the full-lane implementation proof boundary; keep GitHub issue closure separate from draft PR creation.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact stack branch names, PR titles, and whether to use gh fallback for PR creation.
canonical_core.escalate_when: GitHub auth, push permission, or branch base discovery fails.
canonical_core.next_action: Split the current #2046 diff into stacked review branches, push them, and create draft PRs with chained bases.
proof_expectations: push success for each stack branch
gh pr create/list evidence for each draft PR
reuse completed implementation validation already recorded in the archived #2046 lane evidence
completion_criteria: At least two stacked draft PRs exist on GitHub for the #2046 lane.
Each non-root PR targets the previous stack branch as its base.
Final response reports PR URLs, branch order, validation, and any unclaimed residue.
canonical_core.continuation_owner: Draft PR stack #2050/#2051/#2052; GitHub #2046 remains external review/merge ownership.

goal: Publish the #2046 lane implementation as stacked draft PRs.
non_goals: Do not publish unrelated backlog work except command-owned planning state required by this stack.
